name: Hangzhou Alltest Biotech Co., Ltd.
summary: Hangzhou Alltest Biotech Co., Ltd. is a China-based company specializing in the research, development, manufacturing, and sales of in-vitro diagnostic (IVD) products. Their products include rapid diagnostic tests, molecular diagnostic assays, and other IVD reagents used for disease detection. Hangzhou Alltest Biotech Co., Ltd. is headquartered in China.
